record.field: common_values = {'name': 'Ex. ' + record.name, 'description': record.description, 'amount_type': 'code', 'price_include_override': 'tax_included', 'include_base_amount': True, 'x_is_excise': True, 'formula': quantity * product.x_excise_amount, 'tax_group_id': env.ref('excisement_management.excises_tax_group', raise_if_not_found=False).id} record['x_sales_tax_id'] = record.create(common_values | {'type_tax_use': 'sale'}) record['x_purchase_tax_id'] = record.create(common_values | {'type_tax_use': 'purchase'}) })
